entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important oilseed crop (Arachis hypogaea L) cultivated globally

entities.name: OILSEED CROP
entities.description: A crop grown for its oil-rich seeds

entities.name: FASTIGIATA
entities.description: A subspecies and botanical variety of groundnut

entities.name: HYPOGAEA
entities.description: A subspecies and botanical variety of groundnut

entities.name: PERUVIANA
entities.description: A botanical variety of the fastigiata subspecies of groundnut

entities.name: AEQUATORIANA
entities.description: A botanical variety of the fastigiata subspecies of groundnut

entities.name: VULGARIS
entities.description: A botanical variety of the fastigiata subspecies of groundnut

entities.name: HIRSUTA
entities.description: A botanical variety of the hypogaea subspecies of groundnut

entities.name: CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental factors including temperature and humidity where the crop is grown

entities.name: WARM TROPICAL
entities.description: A type of climatic condition suitable for groundnut growth

entities.name: HUMID TEMPERATE
entities.description: A type of climatic condition suitable for groundnut growth

entities.name: FROST-FREE PERIOD
entities.description: A period of at least 90 days without frost required for groundnut production

entities.name: MEAN TEMPERATURES
entities.description: Average temperatures during the growing season, typically ranging from 24 to 33°C

entities.name: DRY MATTER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The accumulation of biomass in the plant

entities.name: BASE TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The temperature at or below which the rate of progress towards a phenological event is zero

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of a seed developing into a plant

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where low temperatures at planting can affect groundnut germination

entities.name: NORTH AMERICA
entities.description: A region where low temperatures at planting can affect groundnut germination

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Temperatures (e.g., 12°C) that can delay or impair germination

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: ECONOMIC LOSS
entities.description: Financial loss to farmers due to poor crop performance

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: Differences in DNA sequences among individuals of a species

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURE TOLERANCE AT GERMINATION
entities.description: The ability of a plant to germinate successfully under low temperature conditions

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a germplasm collection used to identify genetic variation and traits
